steps.title: Build the confidence interval
steps.content:
A margin of error specifies the plausible range around a point estimate. The interval extends from the estimate minus the margin to the estimate plus the margin:

$$12\% - 3.62\% = 8.38\% \quad \text{(lower bound)}$$

$$12\% + 3.62\% = 15.62\% \quad \text{(upper bound)}$$

steps.title: Identify the correct conclusion
steps.content: The confidence interval [8.38%, 15.62%] represents all values that are plausible for the true defect percentage based on the sample and margin of error. This is exactly what choice B states. That matches choice B — B is correct.
